must_have_quals: Have strong fundamentals in computer science and previous experience building backend services at scale, You are proficient in at least one backend programming language such as Java, Scala, Python, or similar, You are highly adaptable and enjoy picking up new technologies, moving confidently across different parts of systems and tech stacks, You are comfortable using AI-powered developer tools such as Claude as part of your development workflow to learn new technologies, accelerate development, and solve complex problems, You thrive in fast-moving environments, handle change with ease, and communicate clearly with teammates and external partners
core_responsibilities: Build and operate production backend systems that enrich and improve the listening experience of music videos, Design, develop, and evolve scalable backend services and APIs that support high-traffic surfaces, Architect, develop, and operate Java services and Scio pipelines used by millions of listeners every day, Partner closely with product managers, and engineers to solve complex problems and deliver seamless user experiences, Contribute within an autonomous, cross-functional squad, contributing to system design, code quality, and operational excellence
job_summary: Spotify is a leading audio streaming subscription service that transformed music listening. They are seeking a Backend Engineer to build and operate production backend systems that enhance the listening experience of music videos and support artists in connecting with their fans.
